title: cyclobalanopsis chevalieri
intro: Cyclobalanopsis chevalieri, also known as Chevalier's oak, is a species of tree native to China, belonging to the Quercus genus of deciduous and evergreen oaks. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis chevalieri include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
